ValidationRule.description: When Compliance Status is changed, provide Comment.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Compliance_Status__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Compliance_Status__c, "None")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Compliance_Status__c, "Pending")), NOT(ISCHANGED( Compliance_Comment__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Update Comment when Compliance Status is changed.
